/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/chess.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/board/board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/evaluation/eval.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/hash/tt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/hash/zobrist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/movegen/attacks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/movegen/movegen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/search/search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/uci/uci.cpp.o -o chess
